creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
working
Perl exmpaple

working before:
$dsn = 'DBI:mysql:database';

now:
DBI connect('*****','***',...) failed: Can't connect to local MySQL server through  socket '/var/run/mysql' (38) 

Workaround:
$dsn = 'DBI:mysql:database:mysql_socket=/car/run/mysql/mysql.sock';
